runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (30.84) at Wanganui in a Class 2/3, finishing seventh and beaten 6 lengths. Has six wins and nine placings from 19 starts from the draw. Others rate better this time.

runners.formComment: Finished third last time (25.99) over 457m at Cambridge Raceway. Drawn close to the inside. Can feature.

runners.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (26.02) over 457m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

runners.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Class 5 H at Wanganui when a 5 length third but did run a decent 30.15 over the 520m journey. Leading contender.

runners.formComment: Showed good improvement when second behind Jay Walker at this track last start over 457m (25.86). Solid chance with even luck.

runners.formComment: Came from wide draw and finished 5th over 520m at Wanganui beaten 4.5 lengths (30.73) behind Crossfit Queen in a Class 2/3 on April 10. Looks tested in this company.
